description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs - fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Black top with grey print at the yoke, has a V-neck, short sleeves, gathers at the sides above the hem and a toe-up detail at the back neckMaterial and Care 96% polyester, 4% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
